mapper.select: SELECT IDX ,MENU_ID ,TITLE ,CONTENT ,WRITER ,TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-DD-MM') REGDATE ,HIT FROM BOARD WHERE MENU_ID = #{menu_id} ORDER BY IDX DESC
SELECT IDX ,MENU_ID ,TITLE ,CONTENT ,WRITER ,TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-DD-MM') REGDATE ,HIT FROM BOARD WHERE MENU_ID = #{menu_id} ORDER BY IDX DESC
SELECT IDX ,MENU_ID ,TITLE ,CONTENT ,WRITER ,REGDATE ,HIT FROM BOARD WHERE IDX = #{idx} ORDER BY IDX DESC
